response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates extensive full-stack engineering experience (15+ years), entrepreneurial mindset, and recent AI-agent infrastructure contributions, aligning with key responsibilities. However, his expertise is heavily skewed toward traditional software development (web, mobile, embedded) with limited direct cloud or AI product-building experience, and no clear evidence of large-scale AI platform strategy or recognized AI expertise.
strengths: 15+ years of full-stack and systems engineering experience
Entrepreneurial background with open-source and startup involvement
Recent AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling contributions
concerns: Limited explicit cloud or AI platform strategy experience
No clear evidence of building AI-powered products at scale
Lacks advanced AI/ML academic credentials (e.g., PhD or MS in AI-related field)
